Email domain pnwtradingco.com does not resolve (DNS lookup failed). Phone number uses 555 prefix reserved for fictional use. No actual company matches this exact combination. Seed data pattern in seed_crm.py confirms synthetic test data convention.

privileged_info_summary: The create_lead task uses fully synthetic test data. The email domain contact@pnwtradingco.com does not exist (DNS resolution failed). The phone number +1 (503) 555-0192 uses the 555 prefix, which is reserved for fictional/test use in the North American Numbering Plan (NANP). The company 'Pacific Northwest Trading Co.' is a real company name (businesses exist with this name in Solvang, CA and Camas, WA), but combined with the fictional email domain and phone number, the specific lead record being created is synthetic test data. All specified fields (title, company name, email, phone, expected revenue amount, and internal notes) are confirmed as specified in the task description.
